calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Feb-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. There being no appearances, the tentative ruling on PLAINTIFFS FELIX GUNAWAN, TAJE FLEMING, TOMA STAVREV, and SAIF AHMED's Motion For Dismissal Of Action Without Prejudice as follows: Granted as unopposed.
